mission: Know Before You Go / Know Before You Respond
finalDetermination: PASS - launch-focus desktop browser validation now measures and constrains the actual visible Portrait V2 root to phone-style width while Operations Center remains disabled and non-rendered.
actualContainmentRootCause: V746 toggled the launch-focus class on body and audited #gridlyPortraitV2, but #gridlyPortraitV2 remained the full fixed viewport and its fixed-position children were anchored to the desktop viewport. The containment marker existed, but the actual measured root stayed wide because no transformed/contained phone-width root created a containing block for the portrait chrome.
